work_unit: Normalize derived_fixes non-terminal status values to enum-conformant rejected + metadata
situation: audit-2026-07-07-033 H-META-001: M-POST-001 uses status='deferred-to-debt-queue' and L-POST-001 uses status='deferred-low-priority', both outside the documented {pending, merged, rejected} terminal-state enum in constraints §A line 54. This violates the cycle-complete state-machine invariant — future automation checking derived_fixes.every(f => ['merged','rejected'].includes(f.status)) would return false despite cycle being declared complete.
action: PENDING DISPATCH — next fix-in-progress round will edit audit-cycle-state.json to normalize M-POST-001 status to 'rejected' with _deferred_to_debt_id metadata, and L-POST-001 status to 'rejected' with _deferral_reason metadata. Single-file edit, no public interface change → route-fix via opt-worktree reuse.
outcome_evidence: Case created as derived fix from audit-2026-07-07-033. Dispatch deferred to next fix-in-progress round per constraints A (audit round does not also dispatch fixes).
next_suggestion: Next round: dispatch case-097 (this case) via opt-worktree.sh commit on audit-cycle-state.json. Then dispatch case-098 (SD-016/SD-017 materialization). After both merge/reject, cycle returns to cycle-complete.
